page_content:
Formerly: THET608E.

THET619 Special Topics in Theatre (2-6 Credits)

This is a rotating "special topics” course that will address the history and theory of theatre, performance, and design.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
